creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Danilo Egea Gondolfo from comment #1)
Better add to Makefile:
PATCH_SITES=    https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL/commit/
PATCHFILES+=    8f860b36983152998dc212a294325dcff26bb6f2.patch:-p1
# Fixed crash if joystick functions are passed a NULL joystick

You can check example in net/freerdp/Makefile.
